description_long: This is a male adult figure with a neatly groomed beard and short hair, wearing a button-up shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the forearms. He is dressed in fitted pants secured with a belt and sturdy, ankle-high boots. The figure has a casual yet put-together appearance, suitable for an urban environment such as a city street or park. His hands are relaxed and positioned by his sides, and he wears glasses with a modern, rectangular frame. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a slim build, and the overall posture is upright and natural. The figure's facial features are well-defined, and the attire suggests a contemporary, everyday style.
description: A casually dressed adult male with glasses, a button-up shirt, fitted pants, and boots, standing upright with a relaxed posture. The figure has a neat beard and short hair, presenting a modern urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, glasses, button-up shirt, belt, pants, and boots, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, beard, glasses, and the fitted nature of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, belt, pants, and boots, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hairstyle, and the fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted pants, and a belt
